data.content:
Run this:

```
dotnet test --filter "TestCategory=Integration"
```

This will run only the 3 tests tagged with `[TestCategory("Integration")]`:

- `CreateOrder_SavesInDatabase`
- `CreateOrder_SendsNotification`
- `ProcessPayment_GatewayTimeout_Retries`
data.reasoningText: The user wants to know how to filter by the "Integration" category using dotnet test. This is an MSTest project using VSTest (no MTP runner enabled). The tests use `[TestCategory("Integration")]`.
